zh.Trecastell, Llangoed, Anglesey, Wales: 英國威爾斯安格萊利朗德

zh.Breigan, Llansanwyr, Glamorganshire, Wal: 英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根利安善納
zh.lifeSummary: 當Madog ap Gronwy於1292年出生在英國威爾斯安格萊利朗德時，他的父親Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy66歲，母親Catrin ferch Madog42歲。他於1325年與Gwladus ferch Griffith在威爾士安格萊結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世在威爾士安格萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Madog ap Gronwy于1292年出生在英国威尔斯安格萊利朗德时，他的父亲Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy66岁，母亲Catrin ferch Madog42岁。他于1325年与Gwladus ferch Griffith在威尔士安格萊结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世在威尔士安格萊。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Gronwy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gronow
meanings: Welsh: relationship name from the Welsh personal name Goronwy (also found as Gronw and Gronow, from Old Welsh Guorgonui).

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

en.lifeSummary: When Madog ap Gronwy was born in 1292, in Llangoed, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy, was 66 and his mother, Catrin ferch Madog, was 42. He married Gwladus ferch Griffith in 1325, in Anglesey, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in Anglesey, Wales.

fr.Trecastell, Llangoed, Anglesey, Wales: Llangoed, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Madog ap Gronwy est né en 1292, à Llangoed, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy, avait 66 ans et sa mère, Catrin ferch Madog, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Gwladus ferch Griffith en 1325, à Anglesey, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé à Anglesey, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Madog ap Gronwy 1292 in Llangoed, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy 66 und seine Mutter Catrin ferch Madog 42. Er hat 1325 in Anglesey, Wales Gwladus ferch Griffith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb in Anglesey, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Madog ap Gronwy è nato il nel 1292 nel Llangoed, Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy, aveva 66 anni e il suo madre, Catrin ferch Madog, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Gwladus ferch Griffith nel 1325, nel Anglesey, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel Anglesey, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Madog ap Gronwyが1292年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイランゴエドで生まれた時，父Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwyは66歳，母Catrin ferch Madogは42歳であった。1325年にウェールズアングレセイでGwladus ferch Griffithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼はウェールズアングレセイで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Madog ap Gronwy(이)가 1292년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시 랭드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy(은)는 66세였고, 그의 어머니 Catrin ferch Madog(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1325년 웨일스 앤글레시에서 Gwladus ferch Griffith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 웨일스 앤글레시에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Madog ap Gronwy nasceu em 1292, em Llangoed, Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy, tinha 66 anos e sua mãe, Catrin ferch Madog, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwladus ferch Griffith em 1325, em Anglesey, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em Anglesey, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Madog ap Gronwy родился в 1292 г. в местности ллангоед, англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy было 66 лет, а матери, которую звали Catrin ferch Madog, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwladus ferch Griffith в 1325 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в местности англеси, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Madog ap Gronwy nació en 1292, en Llangoed, Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy, tenía 66 años y su mamá, Catrin ferch Madog, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Gwladus ferch Griffith en 1325, en Isla Oscura, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en Isla Oscura, Gales.
